feedback.markdownBody:
TESTS FAILED for PAN-1190:

Automated gates passed (bun install --frozen-lockfile; npm run typecheck; npm run lint; npm test), but browser UAT did not meet verifying-state acceptance. On https://pan.localhost, live PAN-1190 is still in Review, so the real post-merge verifying path is not observable. A browser-only fixture setting PAN-1190 to status=Verifying/state=verifying_on_main/mergeStatus=merged still rendered PAN-1190 under Ship/Done with COMPLETED/MERGED on Board/Pipeline and no VERIFYING badge; Close Out only appeared as bulk-selection action text, not as the issue verifying close-out action. Unmet criteria: verifying_on_main issue visible on Command Deck/Pipeline/Board with VERIFYING badge and Close Out action while merge action is hidden.

## REQUIRED: Fix ALL test failures, then invoke the /rebase-and-submit skill

1. Read each test failure carefully
2. Fix the code causing EVERY failure
3. Run the test suite locally to verify your fixes pass
4. Commit every change
5. Invoke the /rebase-and-submit skill for PAN-1190 — this is an atomic task that runs pan done (which handles rebase + push + re-submit internally)

Do NOT stop between steps. Do NOT run git push manually — the skill handles it. Do NOT stop until pan done has completed successfully.
